violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. -Employee returned to kitchen and did not wash hands before assembly of bun and pickles for wrapped sandwiches.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. Champs/CBH Kitchen -Case of egg patties left open/exposed at indoor walk in cooler. -Case of raspberry desserts and case of meatloaf patties left open/exposed at outdoor walk in freezer. Champs -Oil filter powder stored open below front hand sink.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Several items were not date marked: CBH kitchen -Commercial salads, open can of gravy and container of canadian bacon were not date marked for dates opened. C-Store -Multiple commercial items at grab n go case are not date marked (i.e. Deli Express items, grab n go sandwiches, burritos, etc.).

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -C-store -Limescale/residue at soda machine ice chutes.--Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Champs -Cloudy water with residue at edges of steam well used to heat sides. C-store -Dried food/debris at nacho cheese dispenser nozzle. (Staff washed and rinsed at 3 comp sink but not sanitized).--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Champs/CBH Kitchen -Residue/debris at prep cooler doors, handles and at edge under cutting board. -Dust/debris at indoor walk in cooler fans. -Residue/debris at bottom interior of 2 door refrigerator. C-store - Some dust/debris at walk in cooler fans.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Three compartment sink was not maintained or operated in the approved three step method. Champs/CBH Kitchen -3rd compartment sink stopper does not work. -Limescale/debris/residue at interior surfaces of unused/out of order dishwasher. C-store -3 compartment sink is not well maintained-dirty dishes at dirty side, dispensers do not appear to operated regularly.

Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not covered or inverted during storage. Champs/CBH Kitchen -Single use containers and dishes are not inverted throughout kitchen prep area.

Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Disposable cloth sanitizer solution found at less than 100ppm Quat. *COS-Must refresh wipes frequently as needed to ensure a 200-400ppm Quat solution.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Multiple containers of open commercial salads in walk in cooler are not date marked with open date.

Contaminated food disposition. — --Potentially hazardous food held for greater than four hours between 41F and 140F was not discarded when conditions require. -Note at C-store hot hold cases stated lunch items should be placed in case at 10:30 and disposed of at 3pm. *Ensure hot hold time is for 4 hours or less.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Deli make table had build up of crumbs below cutting board and at bottom interior. -Crumb/debris at interiors of both under counter units. -Residue at sani bucket surfaces and lid. -Residue at handles of the make table, under counter refrigerator and under counter freezer.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --An approved sanitizer was not used during three compartment sink operation. C-Store is washing and rinsing Roller grill but have not been doing a sanitize step.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. -Orange Multi-surface cleaner being used at main kitchen prep surfaces and cutting board without clear water rinse.
Clean/dry location, protected, covered, original containers, labeled (2 pts deducted)
Date marking accomplished, discarded (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (2 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
